items.title: Venezuela, Russia's ‘shadow fleet’ and AI shopping
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
<article>U.S. President Donald Trump says Venezuelan airspace should be considered closed as tensions mount with Nicolas Maduros’ government. Ukraine says naval drones hit two tankers from Russia’s ‘shadow fleet’. Hondurans vote in a divisive election. Plus, we look at how retailers are trying to get on your AI holiday shopping list.



Listen to On Assignment - Tracking Trump’s retribution targets (https://www.reuters.com/podcasts/tracking-trumps-retribution-targets-2025-11-29/) 



Listen to Morning Bid podcast here (https://www.reuters.com/podcasts/reuters-morning-bid/morning-bid-4-trillion-club-2025-11-25/?referrer=singular_click_id%3D626fcc09-fb06-456f-be12-1ab99226fb6e) .

items.title: Hong Kong's Filipinos, Indonesians pray for fire victims | REUTERS
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
<article>Members of Hong Kong's Filipino and Indonesian communities mourned for the victims of a deadly blaze in a high-rise apartment complex in the city which has claimed 146 lives so far.

#News #Reuters #Newsfeed #hongkong #china #fire #investigations

items.title: 'Molly' the turtle released back to sea after recovery
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
<article>🐢 A loggerhead sea turtle that became an internet sensation while undergoing life-saving treatment in the Florida Keys was released back into the ocean, drawing hundreds of spectators to a Key West beach.

items.title: Document that launched Apple heads to auction
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
<article>An emblem of American ingenuity is headed to auction in New York: the foundational agreement that launched what would become one of the world's most valuable companies. The original Apple founding papers could fetch up to $4 million.
 
#apple #auction #tech #stevejobs

items.title: Reuters City Memo: Stockholm
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
<article>Correspondent Simon Johnson explains the unsolved murder of Olof Palme — as shocking for Swedes as the assassination of U.S. President John F. Kennedy, which prompted countless conspiracy theories.

#stockholm #crime #olofpalme #sweden</article>

items.title: Monarch butterfly season kicks off in Mexico
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
<article>A sanctuary for monarch butterflies in central Mexico officially opened to visitors on November 22, offering a chance to see millions of orange-hued insects clustered on oyamel fir trees.
 
#butterfly #monarchbutterfly #mexico #insect</article>

items.title: Airbus issues major A320 recall, threatening holiday travel | REUTERS
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
<article>Airbus ordered immediate repairs to 6,000 of its widely used A320 jets, threatening upheaval during the busiest travel weekend of the year in the US and sparking disruption worldwide.

#airbus #aviation #a320 #aerospace #business #News #Reuters #Newsfeed
